name: Sunshine Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Packages Frozen Corn, Cooked And Drained (10 Oz Each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter in a large skillet.
2. Add squash and cover. Steam until squash is tender.
3. Drain the squash and add seasonings and corn.
4. Cover and cook for 5 more minutes.
5. Stir in cheese.
6. Place in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
7. Top with bread crumbs.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes.
